name: Shiva Kar
tagline: C Programmer & Systems Engineer in the Making
bio: First-year BCA student at Amity University Online, specializing in Software Engineering. My focus is on deep technical fundamentals — not frameworks or hype technologies. I follow a structured engineering path: C foundation → DSA → Operating Systems → Backend Engineering → Distributed Systems → Cloud Infrastructure.

experience.title: Internshala Student Partner (Cohort 55 & 56)
bullets: Promoted internships and skill-based programs among students at Amity University Online
Created awareness through digital platforms and peer-to-peer outreach
Assisted students in understanding career pathways and practical learning options

education.degree: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) — Software Engineering

projects.title: Custom Garbage Collector
projects.desc: Building a garbage collector in C to understand manual memory management, heap internals, and object tracking. Covers mark-and-sweep algorithm, root tracing, and allocation metadata.

projects.title: Unix-like Shell
projects.desc: Building a minimal Unix shell in C with command parsing, execution via fork/exec, and process management. Covers system calls, file descriptors, signal handling, and piping fundamentals.

projects.title: Git Implementation
projects.desc: Building a simplified Git clone in C to understand content-addressable storage, blob and tree objects, and commit history. Covers file I/O, hashing, and version control internals from scratch.

certifications.name: Programming in C and C++ with AI

interests: Backend engineering and distributed systems architecture
Systems programming, memory management, and OS internals
Algorithms, debugging, and low-level performance optimization
